detect.title: Select Easywave device
detect.description: {count} Easywave USB sticks found. Select the one to use.

abort.no_devices_found: No supported Easywave USB stick was found. Make sure the RX11 is plugged in and recognized by the system.

cannot_delete_rx11.message: The RX11 USB Transceiver cannot be removed via the device menu. To remove the RX11, please delete the entire Easywave integration via the three-dot menu of the integration entry.

frequency_not_permitted.title: Easywave: {frequency} not permitted in {country}
frequency_not_permitted.description:
This Easywave hardware operates on **{frequency}**, which is **not permitted** in your configured Home Assistant region (**{country}**).

The integration has been disabled for regulatory compliance.

If you believe this is incorrect, verify your country setting under **Settings → System → General → Country**. The 868 MHz band is permitted in EU/EEA countries, the UK, Switzerland, and other CEPT member states.
